name: ai_marketing_claude
description: A comprehensive AI-powered marketing toolkit for Claude Code that integrates 15 parallel subagents to perform website audits, generate marketing copy, email sequences, ad campaigns, content calendars, competitive intelligence analyses, and produce client-ready PDF reports.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website to be audited or analyzed.

inputs.name: marketing_goals
inputs.description: Description of marketing objectives or campaign goals.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Details about the target customer segment for campaigns or content.

inputs.name: product_service_info
inputs.description: Information about the product or service to be marketed.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Settings and preferences for email sequences, ad campaigns, or content calendars (e.g., schedule, frequency, channels).

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: A detailed website audit report assessing the site and identifying improvement opportunities.

outputs.name: marketing_copy
outputs.description: Generated marketing copy suitable for ads, emails, or content.

outputs.name: email_sequence
outputs.description: A sequence of automated marketing emails tailored to the target audience.

outputs.name: ad_campaign_blueprint
outputs.description: Structured plan for ad campaigns including messaging and targeting strategies.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: A scheduled calendar of content initiatives optimized for engagement.

outputs.name: competitive_intelligence_report
outputs.description: Insights on competitors delivered in a client-ready report format.

steps: Input target website URL and marketing goals.
Run parallel subagents to audit the website and gather data.
Generate marketing copy, email sequences, and ad campaign strategies based on inputs.
Create a content calendar aligned to the marketing plan.
Analyze competition and generate intelligence reports.
Compile outputs including PDF reports for client presentation.
use_cases: Marketing teams requiring automated multi-channel campaign creation.
Agencies needing fast website audits and client-ready reports.
Businesses optimizing marketing strategies with AI-generated content.
Competitive benchmarking and intelligence gathering for marketing decisions.
Generating comprehensive marketing plans including copy, emails, ads, and calendars.
patterns: Use of parallel AI subagents to perform multiple marketing tasks concurrently
Automated website auditing with AI-driven analysis
Dynamic email sequence creation based on inputs
Generation of client-ready PDF reports summarizing marketing diagnostics and strategies
Integration of competitive intelligence within a marketing automation pipeline

prompt_templates.name: Website Audit Request
prompt_templates.template: Audit the website at {website_url} and provide a detailed report on its marketing effectiveness.

prompt_templates.name: Generate Marketing Copy
prompt_templates.template: Create compelling marketing copy for a {product_service_info} targeting {target_audience} with the goal of {marketing_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: Email Sequence Generator
prompt_templates.template: Develop an email marketing sequence for {product_service_info} to engage {target_audience} aimed at {marketing_goals}.

prompt_templates.name: Ad Campaign Planner
prompt_templates.template: Design an ad campaign blueprint leveraging {campaign_parameters} for marketing {product_service_info} to {target_audience}.

prompt_templates.name: Competitive Intelligence Report
prompt_templates.template: Analyze competitors relevant to {product_service_info} and summarize findings in a client-ready report.
